intro: The reclamation works clank and hiss, conveyor belts feeding a great furnace and a stamping assembler. The foreman waves you over: bring it scrap, and it makes something useful.
title: The Fabricator
description: Two machines hum here. The SMELTER melts down a held item - pour in a whole stack and the more (and finer) you feed it, the higher the rarity of the bar you get back. The FABRICATOR stamps one item into a production relic. Or you can salvage nothing and move on.

1.label: Use the Smelter
1.tooltip: (+) Melt down a held item's whole stack into a higher-rarity item (the more you pour, the better).
1.selected: You tip the items into the crucible and watch them melt.

2.label: Use the Fabricator
2.tooltip: (+) Stamp one held item into a random production relic (Scrap Magnet / Quartermaster / Collector's Album).
2.selected: You drop the item onto the assembler line.

3.label: Walk away
3.selected: Nothing here you need. You move on.

invalidSelection: That Pokemon has no item to feed the works.
smelted: The crucible pours out a gleaming new bar - reforged into something far more useful!
fabricated: The assembler stamps, hisses, and spits out a finished relic!
